name: 11ai-nodejs-api-operations
description: Modular, evidence-first skills for common Node.js API development and operations.

interface.shortDescription: Build, inspect, test, and troubleshoot Node.js APIs.
interface.longDescription: A modular toolbox for inspecting Node.js API projects, running local servers, changing routes, validating input, handling errors, securing endpoints, calling upstream APIs, testing behavior, and diagnosing failures.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use the 11ai-nodejs-api-operations skills for this Node.js API task.
